_comment: 单一数据源：修改文案只需编辑此文件，然后运行 node build.js 生成 index.html 和 translations.js。个人项目列表在 portfolioProjects，新增项目只需追加对象（slug 唯一），勿改 nth-of-type 序号。

imageAlt.en: Red Packet Rain Lottery System cover

description.en: Enterprise-level lottery activity management platform, supporting red packet rain, lottery events, prizes, and member management. Suitable for high-concurrency scenarios such as corporate annual meetings and holiday events.
description.zh: 面向企业活动场景的抽奖管理平台，支持红包雨、奖品管理与会员管理，适用于年会与节日等高并发活动。

en: Developed User and Activity modules with accurate real-time data display for frontend
Optimized high-concurrency using Redis preloading and token bucket + Lua scripts to prevent overselling
Implemented asynchronous lottery processing with RabbitMQ for improved system stability
Achieved QPS of 2312 on core interfaces through JMeter performance testing
zh: 完成用户与活动模块开发，保障前端实时数据展示准确
通过 Redis 预热与令牌桶 + Lua 脚本优化并发，避免超卖
引入 RabbitMQ 异步抽奖流程，提升系统稳定性
核心接口压测达到 2312 QPS

description.en: A catering management system with frontend-backend separation, including a merchant backend management system and a user mini program. Supports dishes, set meals, categories, and orders, optimizing user ordering experience and merchant management efficiency.
description.zh: 前后端分离的餐饮管理系统，包含商家后台与用户端小程序，覆盖菜品、套餐、分类与订单等核心流程。

en: Developed merchant backend managing employees, dishes, categories, and set meals with pagination
Implemented mini-program caching for dishes and set meals, improving frontend interaction efficiency
Built shopping cart management (add, view, clear) and order submission workflow
Designed payment flow with simulated WeChat Pay integration for smooth user ordering experience
zh: 实现商家端员工、菜品、分类与套餐管理，并支持分页查询
实现菜品与套餐缓存，优化用户端交互响应效率
完成购物车与下单流程开发，打通关键交易链路
设计模拟微信支付流程，提升下单体验完整性

description.en: A city-based carpooling platform supporting drivers posting trips, passenger route matching, order generation, and message notifications. Based on microservices architecture with high availability and real-time communication, covering registration, trip publishing, ride invitations, and complete payment workflow.
description.zh: 基于微服务的同城拼车平台，支持行程发布、路线匹配、订单处理与消息通知，覆盖从注册到支付的完整流程。

en: Developed User module with personal info, password modification, and document uploads
Integrated Baidu OCR for automatic vehicle and identity document recognition
Designed trip fare calculation algorithm using Decorator pattern with map API integration
Implemented order timeout handling and WebSocket real-time push for smooth user interaction
zh: 完成用户模块开发，支持资料维护、密码修改与证件上传
接入百度 OCR，实现证件信息自动识别
使用装饰器模式实现计价算法，并结合地图 API 完成路径计算
实现订单超时处理与 WebSocket 实时推送，提升交互体验

en.title: Joyce | Portfolio
en.metaDescription: Joyce's portfolio: HSBC software testing professional, ISTQB Certified Tester, and aspiring full-stack engineer with strong Java backend foundations.
en.ogDescription: HSBC Software Testing | ISTQB Certified Tester | Aspiring Full-Stack Engineer
en.twitterDescription: HSBC Software Testing | ISTQB Certified Tester | Aspiring Full-Stack Engineer

text..first-visit-modal-body: This site works best on desktop. On mobile or in WeChat it adapts; in WeChat if something looks wrong, tap … → Open in browser.
text..subtitle: Business QA Associate at HSBC · ISTQB Certified Tester · Aspiring Full-Stack Engineer
text..tagline: I build reliable systems with a testing mindset and backend-first foundation, and I am actively growing into frontend engineering with React and TypeScript.
text.#about > .section-intro: Testing by profession, engineering by mindset. I deliver reliable software while steadily expanding my end-to-end engineering capability.
text..about-summary p:nth-child(1): I am a software testing professional at HSBC and an ISTQB Certified Tester, with a Master's degree in Technology and Engineering Management. My daily work covers end-to-end testing across banking systems, where precision, data consistency, and customer impact matter.
text..about-summary p:nth-child(2): Beyond testing delivery, my core technical background is Java backend development. I continue strengthening engineering fundamentals through hands-on work with Spring Boot and related backend practices.
text..about-list li:nth-child(1): Deepening Java backend capabilities and system design thinking
text..about-list li:nth-child(2): Learning Spring AI application development within the Spring ecosystem, building on my Java backend foundation—in progress
text..about-list li:nth-child(3): Learning React and TypeScript as a complementary direction, inspired by my department's AI team's frontend stack
text.#skills > .section-intro: Primarily Spring Boot for Java backends, including REST APIs, MySQL/Redis, and solid service design. Also works with Spring Cloud and messaging in microservice-oriented systems. Builds on that stack with Spring AI for application-style AI features, including conversational flows and model/API integration. Brings card-banking domain experience, along with everyday quality discipline grounded in testing practice.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(1) p: Proficient in Java for backend development with Spring Boot and SSM projects. Builds and maintains APIs with solid RESTful design habits.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(2) p: Comfortable with Spring AI for foundational AI application work, including conversational flows, model integration, and API wiring on the service side.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(3) p: Familiar with MySQL modeling and day-to-day Redis usage, including common cache strategies and practical performance tuning.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(4) p: Understands distributed system basics, with hands-on Spring Cloud microservices and message queue integration for async and cross-service flows.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(5) p: Hands-on familiarity with card domain scenarios, including points programs, marketing campaigns, and payment validation across systems.
text.#projects > .section-intro: Projects that demonstrate backend depth, distributed thinking, and production-oriented engineering decisions.
text.#experience > .section-intro: Delivering quality across complex systems—from banking to infrastructure and O&M platforms—while growing toward end-to-end engineering impact.
text..role-note: Focus on testing strategy, cross-system validation, and stable release quality.
text.#exp-project-1 h4: Project 1: Hang Seng Bank MECP (Major Enhancement on Card Protection) Credit Limit Management
text.#exp-project-2 h4: Project 2: Hang Seng Bank P Loan Universal Form MVP1+MVP2
text.#exp-project-3 h4: Project 3: Hang Seng Bank FUN Center Credit Card Reward Mall
text.#experience .experience-item:nth-of-type: End-to-end billing testing and multi-module functional testing; O&M platform monitoring and environment setup.
text.#exp-project-4 h4: Project 1: OCT Integrated Water and Electricity Platform
text.#exp-project-5 h4: Project 2: Infrastructure and Comprehensive Operation and Maintenance Cloud Platform
text.footer .footer-hint-text: Best on desktop. In WeChat: … → Open in browser

html.#exp-project-1 .project-overview: Project Overview: Optimize credit limit management to protect the interests of both cardholders and the bank.
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(1): Responsible for end-to-end testing of credit limit processes, ensuring consistency of data such as credit limit increase requests, customer information, and other key data, and verifying data exchange across multiple systems.
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(2): Conducted rule validation and tested the credit limit increase notification process, ensuring that non-compliant applications are intercepted and improving system security and customer experience.
html.#exp-project-2 .project-overview: Project Overview: Optimize the loan process, simplify form content, and enhance the customer experience.
html.#exp-project-2 li:nth-child(1): Designed and executed comprehensive test cases covering multiple scenarios to ensure complete testing of the loan process.
html.#exp-project-2 li:nth-child(2): Verified mobile and web loan scenarios, ensuring the accurate extraction of OBS customer data and its submission to the pre-loan system.
html.#exp-project-3 .project-overview: Project Overview: Enhance credit card user engagement and satisfaction by building an all-in-one rewards redemption platform.
html.#exp-project-3 li:nth-child(1): Responsible for testing various modules of the rewards mall, including the points account page, marketing activity displays, points redemption (electronic/physical vouchers), and product purchase flow, ensuring data consistency and accurate payment logic between the front-end and back-end systems.
html.#exp-project-3 li:nth-child(2): Gained in-depth understanding of the entire rewards mall process and participated in testing, combining the FUN Center front-end app and back-end report records to ensure smooth data transfer and accurate display.
html.#exp-project-3 li:nth-child(3): Also involved in Project Fun, testing the reporting function that provides statistical data to internal bank personnel. Focused on verifying the accuracy and completeness of daily and monthly reports to ensure the data is accurate and meets requirements.
html.#exp-project-4 .project-overview: Project Overview: Integrated water and electricity platform with billing system and multi-module management.
html.#exp-project-4 li:nth-child(1): Conducted end-to-end testing of the billing system, covering billing, payment collection, and invoicing. Participated in multi-module functional testing, including customer management, integrated management, and asset management.
html.#exp-project-5 .project-overview: Project Overview: Intelligent operation and maintenance management platform with monitoring system, version testing, and environment setup.
html.#exp-project-5 li:nth-child(1): Responsible for testing the monitoring system of the intelligent operation and maintenance management platform (equipment monitoring, energy management, data analysis, and alarm notifications).
html.#exp-project-5 li:nth-child(2): Supported version testing and environmental setup (system and device modeling, data simulation, and alarm validation).

zh.title: Joyce | 个人作品集
zh.hiddenTitle: 👋 记得回来看看 - Joyce 作品集
zh.metaDescription: Joyce 的个人作品集：汇丰软件测试从业者，ISTQB 认证测试工程师，具备扎实 Java 后端基础并持续成长为全栈工程师。
zh.ogDescription: 汇丰软件测试 | ISTQB 认证测试工程师 | 全栈工程方向
zh.twitterDescription: 汇丰软件测试 | ISTQB 认证测试工程师 | 全栈工程方向

text..first-visit-modal-body: 本站推荐在电脑浏览器访问；手机与微信内也可使用。若在微信内显示异常，请点右上角「…」→「在浏览器中打开」。
text..hero-badge: 正在寻找软件工程师机会
text..subtitle: 汇丰软件测试从业者 · ISTQB 认证测试员 · 全栈工程方向
text..tagline: 我以测试思维和后端基础构建可靠系统，同时持续学习 React 与 TypeScript，提升端到端工程能力。
text.#about > .section-intro: 以测试为职业，以工程为思维。我专注于交付高可靠软件，并持续提升端到端工程能力。
text..about-summary p:nth-child(1): 我目前在汇丰从事软件测试工作，并持有 ISTQB 认证，同时拥有技术与工程管理硕士学位。日常工作覆盖银行多系统端到端测试，关注精度、数据一致性与客户影响。
text..about-summary p:nth-child(2): 在测试交付之外，我的核心技术背景是 Java 后端开发。我通过 Spring Boot 等实践持续强化系统设计与工程实现能力。
text..about-list li:nth-child(1): 深化 Java 后端能力与系统设计思维
text..about-list li:nth-child(2): 基于 Java 后端技术栈，结合 Spring 生态学习 Spring AI 应用开发（进行中）
text..about-list li:nth-child(3): 结合部门 AI 团队使用的 React + TypeScript 技术栈，拓展前端能力
text.#skills > .section-intro: 后端以 Spring Boot 为主，涵盖 REST 接口、MySQL、Redis，以及扎实的服务设计能力。在微服务相关场景中，也会使用 Spring Cloud 和消息队列。在同一套 Spring 体系上结合 Spring AI，开展对话流程、模型接入与接口集成等应用开发。具备信用卡业务实践经验，日常工作也始终以测试与交付质量为基础。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(1) p: 熟练使用 Java 进行后端开发，具备 Spring Boot / SSM 项目经验；能承担接口开发与维护，熟悉 RESTful 设计规范。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(2) p: 掌握 Spring AI，具备基础 AI 应用开发能力，覆盖对话类场景与模型侧接口集成等。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(3) p: 熟悉 MySQL 与 Redis 使用，了解常见缓存策略及基础层面的优化思路。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(4) p: 了解分布式系统基础，具备 Spring Cloud 微服务及消息队列的实际使用经验。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(5) p: 熟悉银行信用卡相关业务，包括积分、营销活动与支付校验等典型场景。
text.#projects > .section-intro: 项目体现了我在后端深度、分布式思维与生产可用性决策方面的工程能力。
text.#experience > .section-intro: 在金融与基础设施等复杂系统中持续交付质量，同时向端到端工程影响力演进。
text..company: 汇丰软件开发（广东）有限公司
text..role-note: 聚焦测试策略、跨系统验证与稳定发布质量。
text.#exp-project-1 h4: 项目一：恒生银行 MECP (Major Enhancement on Card Protection) 信用卡额度管理
text.#exp-project-2 h4: 项目二：恒生银行 P Loan Universal Form MVP1+MVP2
text.#exp-project-3 h4: 项目三：恒生银行 FUN Center 信用卡积分商城
text.#experience .experience-item:nth-of-type: 科华数据股份有限公司
负责计费与运维平台全流程测试及多模块功能验证。
text.#exp-project-4 h4: 项目一：华侨城水电一体化平台
text.#exp-project-5 h4: 项目二：基础设施与综合运维管理云平台
text.footer .footer-hint-text: 推荐电脑端打开，体验更佳

html.#exp-project-1 .project-overview: 项目概述：优化信用额度管理，提升持卡人和银行的利益保护。
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(1): 负责信用额度全流程测试，确保提额申请、客户信息等数据的一致性，并验证多个系统间的数据交换。
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(2): 执行规则校验和提额通知流程测试，确保不合规申请被拦截，优化系统安全性和客户体验。
html.#exp-project-2 .project-overview: 项目概述：优化贷款流程，简化表单内容，提升客户体验。
html.#exp-project-2 li:nth-child(1): 设计并执行全面的测试用例，覆盖多个场景，确保贷款流程的全面测试。
html.#exp-project-2 li:nth-child(2): 验证手机端与 Web 端的贷款场景，确保 OBS 客户信息准确提取并提交至贷前系统。
html.#exp-project-3 .project-overview: 项目概述：提升信用卡用户活跃度和满意度，构建一站式积分兑换平台。
html.#exp-project-3 li:nth-child(1): 负责测试积分商城各功能模块，包括积分账户页面、营销活动展示、积分兑换（电子券/实体券）流程及商品购买流程，确保前后端数据一致性与支付逻辑准确。
html.#exp-project-3 li:nth-child(2): 深入理解并参与测试积分商城全流程，结合 FUN Center 前端 APP 和后台报表记录，确保数据流畅传递与准确展示。
html.#exp-project-3 li:nth-child(3): 同时参与 Project Fun，测试为银行内部人员提供统计数据的报表功能，重点验证日报和月报数据的准确性与完整性，确保数据报告无误并符合需求。
html.#exp-project-4 .project-overview: 项目概述：华侨城水电一体化平台，涵盖计费系统与客户、综合、资产管理等多模块。
html.#exp-project-4 li:nth-child(1): 负责计费系统全流程测试（计费、收缴费、账单等），并参与客户管理、综合管理、资产管理等多模块功能测试。
html.#exp-project-5 .project-overview: 项目概述：智能化运维管理云平台，包含监控、消息与微服务应用及测试环境支撑。
html.#exp-project-5 li:nth-child(1): 负责智能化运维管理平台的监控系统测试（设备监控、能源管理、数据分析、告警通知等微服务），版本测试与支持（消息与微服务应用平台）。
html.#exp-project-5 li:nth-child(2): 参与测试环境搭建（系统与设备建模，数据仿真与告警验证）。

aria..hero-btn-primary: 打开 Joyce 的 Gitee 主页
